objectives.text: Ah, perfect timing! I have been planning a field expedition with our university scholars to gather some rare medicinal herbs - there is a wonderful spot I know of not far from here. The trip out is easy enough, but I worry about getting everyone safely home before nightfall. The forest paths can be treacherous in the dark! I want to craft a Group Teleport Scroll to bring everyone home at once, but I am afraid I have used up all of my Teleport Scrolls on other projects. Could you bring me three?

options.answer: Three scrolls? I can manage that!
That is a lot of scrolls, I am afraid I cannot spare them.

objectives.text: Wonderful! This is everything I need. I will get the Group Scroll crafted and then we are off! The scholars are already beside themselves with excitement - they have been chattering about the trip all week. Come find me tomorrow and I will show you what we gathered. Hopefully it will be worth the journey!

options.answer: I hope you find what you are looking for! I will check in tomorrow.

objectives.text: You are back! Oh, what a day we had! The scholars found twice what I had hoped for - torchflower, orchid, all manner of remarkable specimens! Everyone was safe home before supper thanks to the scroll, which worked perfectly, I am pleased to say. Here, I had a spare scroll from the expedition and I want you to have it along with your scrolls back - you made this whole trip possible. Thank you!

options.answer: It sounds like it was a wonderful success! I am glad I could help.
Tell me more about what you found!

result.text: Oh where to even begin! There was a cluster of torchflower growing right alongside a patch of orchids, which I have never seen before. The scholars were absolutely buzzing. I could talk about it all day, but you should take your reward first! We must do this again sometime.
